examples.title: Basic accordion
examples.description: Single-select: opening one item closes the others. Uses the Accordion namespace API.
examples.code: Cinder is a Svelte 5 design system built for composability and accessibility. Run bun add @lostgradient/cinder and import components from @lostgradient/cinder or via subpath imports. Yes — every component is SSR-safe and renders meaningful HTML before hydration.

examples.title: Dense inspector accordion
examples.description: Inspector panels can compact trigger and panel spacing with public Accordion.Item CSS variables.
examples.code: Current workflow edge, matched transition, and queued activity identifiers. Retry policy, namespace, task queue, and worker lease timing. Normalized event fields and source artifact references.

examples.title: Disabled item
examples.description: A disabled Accordion.Item cannot be toggled.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Accordion } from '@lostgradient/cinder/accordion';
  let expandedIds = $state<string[]>([]);
</script>

<Accordion bind:expandedIds>
  <Accordion.Item id="a" title="Available">This item can be toggled normally.</Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item id="b" title="Disabled (locked)" disabled>
    This content is never shown because the item is disabled.
  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item id="c" title="Also available">This one too.</Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>

examples.title: Multiple open
examples.description: With multiple={true}, any number of items can be open at once.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Accordion } from '@lostgradient/cinder/accordion';
  let expandedIds = $state<string[]>(['faq-1', 'faq-3']);
</script>

<Accordion multiple bind:expandedIds>
  <Accordion.Item id="faq-1" title="Can I use multiple themes?">
    Yes — swap the CSS variables or layer your own tokens on top.
  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item id="faq-2" title="Is it tree-shakeable?">
    Every component is individually importable via subpath exports.
  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item id="faq-3" title="What browsers are supported?">
    Modern evergreen browsers. IE is not supported.
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>
